controls.title: Ensure a print server is not installed (Automated)
system must not have the sendmail package installed.
Ensure nfs-utils is not installed or the nfs-server service is masked (Automated)
Ensure rsync-daemon is not installed or the rsyncd service is masked (Automated)
Check for the existence of rootkit programs
Restricting the directories that FTP users can access after logging in
operating system must use SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
Ensure telnet server services are not in use (Automated)
Prohibit remote telnet login for root user
Set warning banner before telnet login
Set warning banner after telnet login
Ensure Unnecessary Service And Port Disabled (Manual)
SSH daemon must display the date and time of the last successful account logon upon an SSH logon.
Ensure ICMP Redirect Package Not Received
Ensure packet redirect sending is disabled (Automated)
Ensure ICMP Broadcast Package Not Responsed
must use the invoking user's password for privilege escalation when using "sudo".
Ensure Audit Disk Space Set Correct
Ensure cron is restricted to authorized users (Automated)
Record user operations on the device
Ensure filesystem integrity is regularly checked (Automated)
Ensure time synchronization is in use (Automated)
Ensure chrony is running as user _chrony (Automated)
must disable core dumps for all users.
operating system must disable the x86 Ctrl-Alt-Delete key sequence if a graphical user interface is installed.
via the session lock, information previously visible on the display with a publicly viewable image.
Set the umask value of the daemon process
limit the number of concurrent sessions to ten for all accounts and/or account types.

Ensure No hosts.equiv Files In Home Folder

Ensure All Files Have Owner And Group
Ensure all logfiles have appropriate permissions(Automated)
Restrict the permissions of FTP users to upload files
Prohibit global read-write of log files
Delete accounts unrelated to device operation, maintenance, and other work
Ensure pam_unix does not include nullok (Automated)
Ensure /etc/shadow password fields are not empty (Automated)
Prohibit interactive login of system accounts
Check the usage rate of system disk partitions
Ensure Using Strong Hash Algorithm To Encipher Password
Ensure Account Locked After Accessing Fail
Ensure the SELinux mode is not disabled (Automated)
Ensure firewalld default zone is set (Automated)
Ensure authentication required for single user mode (Automated)
Ensure that SSH X11 forwarding is disabled
interactive user accounts must be assigned a home directory upon creation.
Ensure autofs services are not in use (Automated)
